Donor.title: Donor
Donor.description: Represents an individual or organization making a donation to the charity.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Donor entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the donor.

lastName.description: The last name of the donor.

email.description: The email address of the donor, used for communication and receipts.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the donor. (Optional)

addressLine1.description: First line of the donor's address. (Optional, for receipts/reporting)

addressLine2.description: Second line of the donor's address. (Optional)

city.description: The city of the donor's address. (Optional)

stateProvince.description: The state or province of the donor's address. (Optional)

postalCode.description: The postal code of the donor's address. (Optional)

country.description: The country of the donor's address. (Optional)

isGuest.description: Indicates if the donation was made by a guest donor (without a full profile). Defaults to true if no full profile.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the donor record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the donor record was last updated.

Campaign.title: Campaign
Campaign.description: Represents a specific charitable cause, project, or fundraising initiative.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Campaign entity.

name.description: The name of the charitable campaign.

description.description: A detailed description of the campaign's goals and impact.

goalAmount.description: The target fundraising amount for this campaign.

currency.description: The currency in which the goal amount is set (e.g., 'INR', 'USD').

currentRaisedAmount.description: The current amount of funds raised for this campaign.

startDate.description: The start date of the campaign.

endDate.description: The planned end date of the campaign.

isActive.description: Indicates if the campaign is currently active and open for donations.

heroImageUrl.description: URL for the main image displayed prominently for the campaign (e.g., in the hero section).

thumbnailImageUrl.description: URL for a smaller image used in campaign listings or previews.

primaryImpactStatement.description: A concise statement highlighting the primary impact of the campaign, potentially AI-generated.

category.description: The category the campaign belongs to (e.g., 'Child Education', 'Healthcare', 'Disaster Relief').

beneficiaryCommunityIds.description: References to BeneficiaryCommunity entities that benefit from this campaign. (Relationship: Campaign N:N BeneficiaryCommunity)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the campaign was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the campaign was last updated.

Donation.title: Donation
Donation.description: Represents a single monetary contribution made by a donor.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Donation transaction.

donorId.description: Reference to the Donor who made this contribution. (Relationship: Donor 1:N Donation)

campaignId.description: Reference to the Campaign this donation supports. Optional if it's a general donation. (Relationship: Campaign 1:N Donation)

currency.description: The currency of the donation. (e.g., 'INR' as per user request)

transactionDate.description: The date and time when the donation transaction occurred.

paymentMethodType.description: The type of payment method used (e.g., 'Credit Card', 'Debit Card', 'Apple Pay', 'Google Pay').

transactionReference.description: A unique reference ID provided by the payment gateway for the transaction.

status.description: The current status of the donation transaction (e.g., 'Completed', 'Pending', 'Failed', 'Refunded').

isRecurring.description: Indicates if this donation is part of a recurring contribution plan.

recurrenceFrequency.description: The frequency of the recurring donation (e.g., 'monthly', 'annually'). Required if isRecurring is true.

nextRecurrenceDate.description: The date of the next scheduled payment for a recurring donation. Required if isRecurring is true.

honoreeName.description: The name of the individual in whose honor the donation was made. (Optional)

honoreeEmail.description: The email address of the honoree, for sending digital acknowledgments. (Optional)

honoreeMessage.description: A personal message from the donor to the honoree. (Optional)

acknowledgmentEmailSent.description: Indicates if a digital acknowledgment email has been sent to the honoree.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the donation record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the donation record was last updated.

StaffMember.title: StaffMember
StaffMember.description: Represents a member of the organization's staff or dedicated volunteers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StaffMember entity.

name.description: The full name of the staff member.

email.description: The email address of the staff member.

role.description: The job title or role (e.g., 'Field Coordinator', 'Accountant').

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the staff member.

joinedDate.description: The date they joined the organization.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

BeneficiaryCommunity.title: BeneficiaryCommunity
BeneficiaryCommunity.description: Represents a specific group or region that benefits from charitable activities, addressing the 'community' aspect of the request.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BeneficiaryCommunity entity.

name.description: The name of the beneficiary community (e.g., 'Rural Sindh Village A', 'Orphanage XYZ in Karachi').

description.description: A description of the community and its needs.

geographicRegion.description: The geographical area where this community is located (e.g., 'Punjab, Pakistan', 'Mumbai, India').

type.description: The type or demographic of the community (e.g., 'Children', 'Elderly', 'Rural Village', 'Disaster Victims').

campaignIds.description: References to Campaign entities that support this community. (Relationship: BeneficiaryCommunity N:N Campaign)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the beneficiary community record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the beneficiary community record was last updated.

TransparencyReport.title: TransparencyReport
TransparencyReport.description: Stores information about publicly available reports and documents for trust and transparency.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TransparencyReport entity.

title.description: The title of the report (e.g., 'Annual Financial Report 2023', 'NGO Registration Certificate').

description.description: A brief description or summary of the report's content.

reportUrl.description: The URL or link to the actual report document (e.g., PDF).

publishDate.description: The date when the report was published or released.

reportType.description: The type of the report (e.g., 'Annual Report', 'Audit Report', 'NGO Registration Document', 'Impact Assessment').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the report record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the report record was last updated.

DonationTier.title: DonationTier
DonationTier.description: Defines preset donation amounts and their associated impact descriptions for campaigns or general donations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DonationTier entity.

campaignId.description: Reference to the Campaign this tier is specific to. Optional for global donation tiers. (Relationship: Campaign 1:N DonationTier)

amount.description: The specific donation amount for this tier (e.g., 10, 50, 100).

currency.description: The currency for this donation tier (e.g., 'INR').

impactDescription.description: A description of the tangible impact this donation amount will have (e.g., 'Provides 10 meals for children', 'Funds a day of education').

sortOrder.description: An integer to specify the display order of this tier in the UI.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the donation tier record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the donation tier record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores individual donor profiles. The `{donorId}` matches the authenticated user's `uid` for logged-in donors.
Main collection for charitable campaigns. Publicly readable.
Records individual donation transactions. Accessible by specific donor and admins.
Collection of staff members and volunteers.
Contains details about the communities or groups that benefit from campaigns.
Stores links and metadata for public transparency documents.
Implements DBAC for administrators. Existence of a document grants privileges.

params.name: uid
params.description: The unique user ID of an administrator.

firestore.reasoning: Added StaffMember entity and /staff collection for organizational management.
